parameters.query:
WITH LatestTripDate AS (
  SELECT MAX(RequestDateKey) AS MaxKey
  FROM Fact_Trip
)
SELECT
  COUNT(t.TripID)                      AS TotalTrips,
  SUM(t.FinalFare)                     AS TotalRevenue,
  AVG(t.FinalFare)                     AS AvgFare,
  AVG(t.DurationMinutes)               AS AvgDurationMins,
  AVG(t.DistanceKM)                    AS AvgDistanceKM,
  SUM(CAST(t.IsCancelled AS INT))      AS Cancellations,
  COUNT(r.RatingID)                    AS RatingsGiven,
  AVG(r.RatingValue)                   AS AvgRating,
  COUNT(c.ComplaintID)                 AS Complaints,
  AVG(e.NetEarning)                    AS AvgDriverNetEarning,
  SUM(e.GrossEarning)                  AS TotalGrossEarning,
  MAX(t.RequestDateKey)                AS ReportDateKey
FROM Fact_Trip t
LEFT JOIN Fact_Rating r
  ON t.TripID = r.TripID
LEFT JOIN Fact_Complaint c
  ON t.TripID = c.TripID
LEFT JOIN Fact_DriverEarnings e
  ON t.TripID = e.TripID
WHERE t.RequestDateKey = (SELECT MaxKey FROM LatestTripDate)
